property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SDKs\Azure\CLI2\wbin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.14 in;C:\Program Files	erraform;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\gbuzu\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2023.3.4 in;;C:\Users\gbuzu\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\gbuzu\.dotnet	ools;C:\Users\gbuzu\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\gbuzu\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;c:\Users\gbuzu\.cursor\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0-universal undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: handleResponseStatusExceptionUsesReasonAndNotFoundTitle
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T20:34:33.592+02:00 WARN 15900 --- [invoicing-manager] [ main] c.i.GlobalExceptionHandler : Request failed with status 404 at GET /customers/99: Customer not found.

testcase.name: handleMethodArgumentTypeMismatchExceptionReturnsBadRequestErrorPage
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T20:34:33.762+02:00 WARN 15900 --- [invoicing-manager] [ main] c.i.GlobalExceptionHandler : Bad request at GET /customers/99: Method parameter 'id': Failed to convert value of type 'java.lang.String' to required type 'java.lang.Long'; For input string: "abc"

testcase.name: handleResponseStatusExceptionFallsBackToDefaultMessageWhenReasonMissing
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T20:34:33.767+02:00 WARN 15900 --- [invoicing-manager] [ main] c.i.GlobalExceptionHandler : Request failed with status 400 at GET /customers/99: Bad Request

testcase.name: handleDataIntegrityViolationReturnsSafeMessage
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T20:34:33.771+02:00 WARN 15900 --- [invoicing-manager] [ main] c.i.GlobalExceptionHandler : Data integrity violation at GET /customers/99: foreign key constraint fails

testcase.name: handleMethodArgumentNotValidExceptionReturnsBadRequestErrorPage
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T20:34:33.788+02:00 WARN 15900 --- [invoicing-manager] [ main] c.i.GlobalExceptionHandler : Bad request at GET /customers/99: Validation failed for argument [0] in public java.lang.String com.invoicingmanager.user.AuthController.register(com.invoicingmanager.user.RegisterUserDTO,org.springframework.validation.BindingResult,org.springframework.ui.Model): [Field error in object 'registerUserDTO' on field 'email': rejected value [null]; codes [NotBlank.registerUserDTO.email,NotBlank.email,NotBlank.java.lang.String,NotBlank]; arguments []; default message [Email is required.]]

testcase.name: handleUsernameNotFoundExceptionReturnsNotFoundErrorPage
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T20:34:33.788+02:00 WARN 15900 --- [invoicing-manager] [ main] c.i.GlobalExceptionHandler : User lookup failed at GET /customers/99: Authenticated user not found.

testcase.name: handleIllegalArgumentExceptionReturnsBadRequestErrorPage
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T20:34:33.798+02:00 WARN 15900 --- [invoicing-manager] [ main] c.i.GlobalExceptionHandler : Bad request at GET /customers/99: Customer phone is required.

testcase.name: handleUnexpectedExceptionReturnsGenericServerErrorMessage
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-22T20:34:33.802+02:00 ERROR 15900 --- [invoicing-manager] [ main] c.i.GlobalExceptionHandler : Unexpected server error at GET /customers/99
java.lang.RuntimeException: database connection failed at com.invoicingmanager.GlobalExceptionHandlerTest.handleUnexpectedExceptionReturnsGenericServerErrorMessage(GlobalExceptionHandlerTest.java:158)
